place: Plai Laem, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Three-Level Sea-View Villa with 16-Metre Pool & Jacuzzi - Plai Laem
blurb: A landmark three-level residence in the exclusive Plai Laem enclave — five en-suite bedrooms across roughly 1,300 m², a resort-style 16-metre pool with a hot-tub jacuzzi, and open living that flows to wide terraces and verandas. Move-in ready and fully furnished, freehold.
detail:
Set in one of Koh Samui's most exclusive residential enclaves on the Plai Laem peninsula, this ultra-luxury villa delivers an extraordinary 1,300 m² of built area across three levels on a 950 m² plot. Designed for high-end tropical living, it combines scale, privacy and premium finishes close to beaches and island amenities, and is offered freehold and fully furnished as a secure, move-in-ready home or blue-chip investment.

Arranged over three floors, the layout balances open social volumes with private retreats — five bedrooms and six bathrooms, high ceilings and large internal volumes, with open living and dining areas flowing seamlessly onto terraces and verandas for year-round indoor-outdoor living. The configuration suits families, guests and luxury rental use alike.

The outdoor centrepiece is a 16-metre swimming pool framed by a generous terrace for sun loungers and outdoor dining, complemented by a dedicated hot-tub jacuzzi for a private resort-style atmosphere. Plai Laem is prized for its upscale villas and easy access to Choeng Mon, Big Buddha and Samui International Airport — a refined yet relaxed setting with strong long-term value.
